description.short: Push selected product rows to Amazon Seller Central
description.long: Reads selected rows from a vault smart-table and creates listings via the Amazon SP-API. Stub manifest — real LWA OAuth + SP-API wiring lands with the Amazon MCP server in v1.1.

actions.name: Publish Selected Rows
actions.description: Publish the selected smart-table rows to Amazon
